overview: Dr. K.V. Subba Reddy Institute of Technology (KVSRIT), established in 2008, is a prominent private engineering institution located in Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh. Part of the Dr. K.V. Subba Reddy Group, the college is known for its focus on emerging technologies and industry-aligned curriculum. It operates with a student-centric approach, emphasizing both technical proficiency and soft-skill development for rural and urban youth.
accreditation: Approved by AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education), New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur (JNTUA).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET rank
Graduation with 50% aggregate + AP ICET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (Computer Science, Structural Engg, VLSI & Embedded Systems)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE/AP PGECET score

placements.highestSalary: ₹5.0 LPA - ₹15.0 LPA (Current cycle reports vary by department)

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level web counseling (APSCHE). 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via entrance ranks. 30% (Category B) are Management Quota seats filled based on institutional merit. Counseling Code: KVSR.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–18, 2026; AP ICET 2026 Results: Mid-May 2026; Counseling: July–August 2026.

facilities: Advanced Computer Labs with latest AI software
Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls (Female-dominant student ratio)
Transportation (Fleet covering Kurnool and nearby areas)
campus.specialNote: KVSRIT is strategically located opposite the Dupadu Railway Station on NH-44, providing high accessibility. The institute is particularly noted for its young, tech-savvy faculty who integrate AI tools into daily teaching and project supervision.

contact.address: Opp: Dupadu Railway Station, NH-44, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh - 518218
